title: Wire Mermaid SVG/PNG rendering into CenterViewport image output
purpose: Finish the missing bridge from MermaidRenderResult.image_data to visible SVG/PNG output in the center VisualViewport. The current code can parse Markdown, detect Mermaid blocks and render Mermaid via mmdc/Playwright, but successful image data is not converted into visible image nodes/frames in the Markdown/Mermaid view, and Sixel output is currently only a stub.
goal: Mermaid diagrams embedded in Markdown must be displayed as actual rendered SVG/PNG images in the center TUI viewport when the active renderer/adapter supports raster/image output. If image output is unavailable, the existing ANSI fallback must continue to show Mermaid source with a clear reason.

context.user_goal: Die beiden Punkte 'Mermaid wirklich als SVG/PNG im CenterViewport anzeigen' und 'Sixel/Kitty-Bildausgabe für Mermaid' sollen mit dem Code abgeglichen und als TODO festgehalten werden.
code_findings: client_surfaces/operator_tui/visual/markdown/markdown_parser.py already parses fenced mermaid blocks into MermaidBlock objects.
client_surfaces/operator_tui/visual/markdown/markdown_ansi_renderer.py renders MermaidBlock either as fallback source or as the text placeholder '[mermaid diagram]'.

client_surfaces/operator_tui/visual/markdown/mermaid_renderer.py already has MermaidCliBackend, PlaywrightBackend and FallbackCodeblockBackend. mmdc can produce SVG and Playwright can produce PNG screenshots.

client_surfaces/operator_tui/visual/views/markdown_mermaid_document_view.py calls MermaidRenderer.render() for each Mermaid block, but successful result.image_data is not attached to the RenderScene. Only failure creates MermaidFallbackInfo for ANSI fallback.
client_surfaces/operator_tui/visual/runtime/frame_model.py already has generic RenderScene nodes and RenderFrame payloads, so image nodes can be represented without changing the whole runtime model.

client_surfaces/operator_tui/visual/renderers/svg_raster_renderer.py can rasterize scene.metadata['svg_text'] or scene.metadata['svg_path'] into PNG, but Markdown/Mermaid view does not currently pass Mermaid SVG into scene.metadata in a usable way.
client_surfaces/operator_tui/visual/renderers/cpu_raster_renderer.py currently draws text nodes into a PNG but does not handle explicit image nodes or Mermaid image payloads.
client_surfaces/operator_tui/visual/adapters/kitty_adapter.py can send raster frames with Kitty graphics protocol when supported=true.
client_surfaces/operator_tui/visual/adapters/sixel_adapter.py accepts raster frames but currently emits a 'sixel-stub' payload, not real Sixel image encoding.
tests/client_surfaces/operator_tui/visual/test_visual_adapters.py explicitly asserts that Sixel output contains 'sixel-stub', confirming it is not a real image path yet.
target_pipeline: MarkdownMermaidDocumentView parses Markdown and extracts Mermaid blocks.
MermaidRenderer renders each Mermaid block to SVG or PNG bytes.
Successful Mermaid image results are represented as explicit image nodes or attached diagram assets in RenderScene metadata.
A Mermaid-aware renderer produces a raster RenderFrame containing the diagram image scaled/clipped for the center viewport.
KittyOutputAdapter sends the resulting PNG bytes with Kitty protocol.
SixelOutputAdapter sends the resulting PNG/RGBA data through a real Sixel encoder where supported.
ANSI fallback continues to show source code and reason when image path is unavailable.
context.design_decision: Do not replace the Markdown ANSI fallback. Add an image-capable path beside it. The Markdown/Mermaid view should emit explicit diagram assets/nodes; renderers decide whether to draw raster images or fallback text. Sixel must be upgraded from stub to real encoding or use a configured external encoder with safe timeout.
non_goals: Do not remove ANSI/source fallback for Mermaid.
Do not require mmdc, Playwright, Kitty or Sixel for the TUI to start.
Do not execute arbitrary renderer commands from document content.
Do not render remote resources by default.

milestones.title: Renderer support for Mermaid image nodes
Kitty and Sixel real image output

tasks.title: Document current Mermaid image wiring gap
tasks.description: Document the exact gap between MermaidRenderer.render() returning image_data and the center viewport only showing placeholder/fallback text.
acceptance_criteria: Docs include current pipeline diagram showing MermaidRenderResult.image_data currently stops inside markdown_mermaid_document_view.py.
Docs include target pipeline diagram from Mermaid source to SVG/PNG RenderFrame to Kitty/Sixel adapter.
Docs explicitly distinguish ANSI fallback, Kitty image output and Sixel image output.
Docs list runtime dependencies: mmdc, Playwright, cairosvg/Pillow, terminal Kitty/Sixel support.

tasks.title: Define RenderScene image node contract
tasks.description: Define a stable node schema for embedded images/diagrams inside a RenderScene.
acceptance_criteria: Image nodes use kind='image' or kind='diagram_image' consistently.
Image node schema includes image_format, image_data or asset_id, x, y, width, height, alt_text and fallback_text.
Schema supports SVG and PNG payloads without requiring raw terminal escape sequences in views.
Frame/model docs or comments state that views may emit image nodes but adapters alone emit terminal protocol escapes.

tasks.title: Add Mermaid image diagnostics metadata
tasks.description: Make each Mermaid block report image/fallback status in RenderScene metadata for debugging and view switcher status.
acceptance_criteria: Scene metadata includes mermaid_blocks_total, mermaid_images_rendered, mermaid_fallback_count and mermaid_renderer_used where known.
Each failed block includes concise reason in diagnostics.
Diagnostics distinguish image rendered but adapter unsupported from renderer failed.
Metadata is covered by unit tests.

tasks.title: Attach successful MermaidRenderResult.image_data to RenderScene
tasks.description: Change the Markdown/Mermaid view so successful Mermaid image results become image/diagram nodes instead of disappearing into a text placeholder.
acceptance_criteria: For each successful MermaidRenderResult, the scene contains a diagram image node with SVG or PNG bytes reachable by renderer.
For failed MermaidRenderResult, existing MermaidFallbackInfo path remains active and source code is shown with reason.
Multiple Mermaid diagrams in one Markdown document are represented independently.
Image node creation respects configured max_diagram_width and max_diagram_height.
No terminal escape sequences are written by the view.

tasks.title: Preserve Markdown text layout around Mermaid images
tasks.description: Ensure rendered diagrams occupy stable rows/space in the center viewport and text before/after diagrams remains readable.
acceptance_criteria: Mermaid image blocks reserve a deterministic vertical area in the rendered document.
ANSI fallback still shows source text in the same block position.
Scroll offset/paging accounts for image block height.
Long documents with text before and after diagrams render predictably.

tasks.title: Add Mermaid image cache integration to view path
tasks.description: Avoid re-running mmdc/Playwright on every frame by caching rendered diagrams by source/config/size.
acceptance_criteria: Cache key includes Mermaid source hash, backend, output format and diagram size.
Repeated render_frame calls for unchanged Markdown do not re-run external Mermaid renderer.
Cache can be disabled by config.
Cache hit/miss counters appear in diagnostics.

tasks.title: Teach CpuRasterRenderer to draw image nodes
tasks.description: Extend CPU raster rendering so RenderScene image nodes are pasted/scaled into the output PNG frame.
acceptance_criteria: Renderer recognizes image/diagram_image nodes with PNG payload and pastes them into the output image.
Renderer recognizes SVG payload and converts it through cairosvg or a safe fallback when available.
Renderer scales diagram images to fit requested node width/height while preserving aspect ratio where possible.
Renderer draws alt/fallback text when image payload cannot be decoded.
Existing text-node rendering continues to work.

tasks.title: Connect SvgRasterRenderer with Mermaid SVG scene metadata or image nodes
tasks.description: Allow Mermaid SVG image nodes to use the existing SVG rasterizer path without abusing global scene.metadata for a single SVG only.
acceptance_criteria: SvgRasterRenderer can rasterize an SVG image node payload, not only scene.metadata['svg_text'].
Multiple SVG diagram nodes are supported or explicitly handled through CPU raster composition.
Missing cairosvg creates placeholder/fallback instead of crashing.
Tests cover SVG node to PNG RenderFrame.

tasks.title: Add renderer selection rules for Markdown/Mermaid image mode
tasks.description: Ensure Mermaid image mode selects image-capable renderer/adapter pairs and falls back to ANSI text when image output is unavailable.
acceptance_criteria: When mermaid_mode=image/auto and image protocols are available, resolver prefers cpu_raster/svg_raster + kitty/sixel.
When only ANSI is available, resolver keeps markdown_mermaid_document usable in degraded/source mode.
View capability report shows Mermaid image available/degraded based on renderer and adapter, not only mmdc/Playwright availability.
Tests cover image-capable and ANSI-only environments.

tasks.title: Verify and harden Kitty PNG output for Mermaid diagrams
tasks.description: Ensure Kitty adapter can display Mermaid PNG frames correctly in the center viewport and clear stale diagram images.
acceptance_criteria: Kitty adapter accepts image/png raster RenderFrames from Mermaid path.
Adapter positions image at region top-left and respects viewport columns/rows.
Adapter clear() is called when switching away from image views or resizing viewport.
Adapter metadata records image_id, payload size and draw result.
Tests assert Kitty escape sequence includes PNG transfer parameters and placement.

tasks.title: Replace Sixel stub with real Sixel image encoding
tasks.description: Implement actual Sixel output for raster frames instead of the current base64 'sixel-stub' placeholder.
acceptance_criteria: Sixel adapter no longer emits 'sixel-stub' for successful draws.
Adapter can encode PNG/RGBA raster frames to real Sixel using a safe internal encoder or configured trusted external encoder.
External encoder path, if used, is configured/trusted and has timeout/size limits.
Adapter reports unsupported/degraded when no encoder is available.
Tests validate real Sixel introducer/terminator and absence of stub marker using a small generated image.

tasks.title: Add terminal capability checks for Mermaid image output
tasks.description: Make capability detection distinguish Mermaid renderer availability from terminal image-output availability.
acceptance_criteria: Capability report includes mermaid_renderer_available, raster_renderer_available, kitty_supported and sixel_supported separately.
View switcher diagnostics can explain whether Mermaid image failed due to mmdc/Playwright, raster renderer, Kitty/Sixel, or terminal support.
Unsupported image protocol falls back to ANSI source, not a silent placeholder.
Tests cover at least four states: all available, renderer missing, terminal protocol missing, ANSI-only.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for Mermaid image nodes from Markdown view
tasks.description: Verify successful Mermaid rendering becomes RenderScene image nodes.
acceptance_criteria: Fake MermaidRenderer returning SVG creates diagram_image node.
Fake MermaidRenderer returning PNG creates diagram_image node.
Fake failure creates ANSI fallback info and no image node.
Multiple Mermaid blocks produce multiple diagram nodes with stable ids.

tasks.title: Add renderer tests for image node raster composition
tasks.description: Verify image nodes actually appear in raster RenderFrame payloads.
acceptance_criteria: PNG image node is pasted into CPU raster output.
SVG image node is converted or produces safe placeholder when cairosvg missing.
Alt/fallback text appears when image data invalid.
Tests do not require mmdc or Playwright.

tasks.title: Update adapter tests for real Sixel and Kitty Mermaid frames
tasks.description: Update tests currently accepting 'sixel-stub' so they assert real image-output behavior or explicit degraded unsupported behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Existing assertion for 'sixel-stub' is removed or changed to a degraded-only test.
Kitty adapter test uses a realistic PNG RenderFrame and verifies image transfer escape.
Sixel adapter test verifies real Sixel output when encoder available and clear unsupported reason when unavailable.
Tests remain deterministic in CI without requiring terminal support.

tasks.title: Add smoke script for Markdown Mermaid image rendering
tasks.description: Provide a manual smoke command that renders a small Mermaid diagram through Markdown view and selected output adapter.
acceptance_criteria: Script can run with --adapter ansi, --adapter kitty and --adapter sixel.
Script prints Mermaid renderer capability status.
Script shows whether output was image, degraded source fallback or unsupported protocol.
Script does not require full Operator TUI startup.

tasks.title: Add end-to-end visual runtime test for Mermaid image path
tasks.description: Test the full path from markdown_mermaid_document view to raster frame to image-capable adapter using fake renderer/capabilities.
acceptance_criteria: VisualRuntime renders markdown_mermaid_document with Mermaid block into raster RenderFrame when image-capable path selected.
Adapter receives raster frame containing Mermaid image payload metadata.
ANSI-only runtime produces source fallback and no crash.
Test avoids real terminal, mmdc and Playwright by using fake Mermaid renderer or monkeypatch.

summary_notes: Mermaid parsing and backend rendering already exist, but successful SVG/PNG bytes are not yet displayed as diagram images in the center viewport.
Kitty adapter has a plausible raster-frame path, but the Markdown/Mermaid view must produce image-capable frames for it.
Sixel adapter is currently a stub and must be replaced or marked degraded until a real encoder exists.
ANSI Mermaid source fallback must remain the safe baseline.

Completed 2026-05-29: All 17 tasks implemented. Pipeline gap closed: MermaidRenderResult.image_data -> diagram_image node -> CpuRasterRenderer -> Kitty/Sixel adapter. Real Sixel encoder implemented (no stub). terminal_detector.py added. E2E tests passing (586 total).

end_summaries.title: Expected result after completion
items: Markdown documents with Mermaid blocks display actual rendered diagrams in the center VisualViewport when image output is supported.
Kitty terminals receive PNG raster frames for Mermaid diagrams through the Kitty graphics protocol.
Sixel-capable terminals receive real Sixel image output instead of the current stub.
ANSI-only environments still show Mermaid source blocks with clear degradation reasons.
Tests cover the full path from Mermaid source to RenderScene image node to RenderFrame to output adapter.
